rationale: Gov't Code §2254.003 governs procurement of professional services by governmental entities. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: A governmental entity may not select a provider of professional services or a group or association of providers or award a contract for the services on the basis of competitive bids submitted for the contract or for the services
_note: Rule text concerns professional services procurement; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
